info.description:
Authentication is handled using JWT tokens. The tokens are set as access-token and refresh-token cookies.
For information regarding which role is authorized for which endpoint, see the http handler https://github.com/Zibbp/ganymede/blob/main/internal/transport/http/handler.go.
info.title: Ganymede API

get.description: Returns API keys, newest first. By default only active (non-revoked) keys are returned; pass ?include_revoked=true for a full audit listing. Secrets are never returned by this endpoint.

post.description: Mints a new admin-managed API key. The full secret is returned in the response and is the only time it is visible — store it securely.

put.description: Replaces an existing API key's editable fields (name, description, scopes). Prefix and secret are immutable — rotating a key still means revoke + create.

delete.description: Soft-deletes an API key by setting revoked_at. The verification cache is flushed so the key stops authenticating immediately.

post.description: Archive a twitch channel (creates channel in database and download profile image)
Login a user (sets access-token and refresh-token cookies). Access token lasts for 1 hour. Refresh token lasts for 1 month.

get.description: Login a user with OAuth (sets access-token and refresh-token cookies)

post.description: Register a user (does not log in)

get.description: Get a single notification configuration by id

delete.description: Delete a notification configuration by id

post.description: Send a test notification using dummy data for the given event type
Adds a view to the video local view count

put.description: Set delay of vod in playlist for multistream
put.summary: Set delay of vod in playlist for multistream

put.description: Test rules for a playlist against a video id

post.description: Set rules for a playlist this will delete all existing rules and set new ones

post.summary: Start a queue task for a queue

post.description: Stop processing the video and chat downloads of an active queue item

parameters.description: Log type: video, video-convert, chat, chat-render, or chat-convert
parameters.name: type

get.description: Get a twitch user/channel by name (uses twitch api)
Get a twitch vod by id (uses twitch api)

parameters.description: Processing. Set to false to exclude videos that are still processing.
parameters.name: processing

get.description: Get N number of vod chat comments before the start time (used for seeking)
get.summary: Get number of vod chat comments

get.description: Get user id from chat json file

update_metadata_minutes.description: Queue metadata update X minutes after the stream is live. Set to 0 to disable.

video_age.description: restrict fetching videos to a certain age

created_by_id.description:
CreatedByID is the UUID of the admin who minted this key. Null
for keys created before the audit edge was added. Frontend uses
it to show "minted by <username>" in the list and detail views.

revoked_at.description:
RevokedAt is null for active keys; set when an admin revokes
the key. Surfaced in list responses when ?include_revoked=true
is passed so admins can audit historical state.

scopes.description:
Scopes is the raw list of resource:tier strings granted to the key.
Frontend converts these to badges; clients use them to predict what
requests will succeed.

category.description: the default/main category of the video

ApiKeyAuth.description: Authorization: Bearer gym_<prefix>_<secret>. Mint a key via the admin UI.
ApiKeyAuth.name: Authorization
